reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark the deterministic claim-discovery proof-plan packet boundary satisfied; do not infer discovered claims are verified.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim names shipped deterministic claim-discovery packet behavior rather than model-backed review or eval verdicts.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by runtime and CLI tests: `discover claims` writes `cautilus.claim_proof_plan.v1`, preserves source refs, keeps proof routes distinct, and carries a non-verdict notice instead of marking discovered claims verified.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep deterministic discovery tests current when changing candidate extraction, proof routing, source refs, or non-verdict packet semantics.
